See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 22245 => 'Nouakchott', 2224513 => 'Néma', 2224515 => 'Aioun', 2224533 => 'Kaédi', 2224534 => 'Sélibaby', 2224537 => 'Aleg', 2224544 => 'Zouérat', 2224546 => 'Atar', 2224550 => 'Boghé', 2224563 => 'Kiffa', 2224569 => 'Rosso/Tidjikja', 2224574 => 'Nouadhibou', ];
